name: Bidirectional Sequence Diagram — Peer Review Process
input: Create a sequence diagram showing the academic peer review process. Participants: Author, Editor, Reviewer1, Reviewer2, Reviewer3. Flow: Author submits manuscript to Editor. Editor sends to all 3 reviewers simultaneously. Each reviewer returns verdict independently (Reviewer1: Accept with minor revisions, Reviewer2: Major revisions required, Reviewer3: Accept). Editor compiles decision and sends 'Revise and Resubmit' to Author. Author revises and resubmits. Editor sends to Reviewer2 only for re-review. Reviewer2 returns 'Accept'. Editor sends final 'Accepted for Publication' to Author. Include a note over Editor about 'Desk Review: 3 business days'.
qualityCriteria: Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Sequence diagram with 5 participants, parallel review dispatch, revision cycle, notes, professional journal peer review flow.
